decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is broken and the active 74k daily dip still has time to play out.
decision.rationale: The latest Beecthor thesis remains bearish and the live daily 74k dip position is still aligned with it, with roughly two hours left before expiry and no take-profit or invalidation trigger. However, the reconciliation gate is currently broken because account_state open_exposure does not match live positions, so the playbook blocks any new entry until state is coherent again. The discarded weekly 80k reach no longer blocks the slot, but it does not justify forcing a fresh trade while reconciliation is failing.
